title: Minimal Architectural Landmark Poster AI
sourceTitle: Minimal Architectural Landmark Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: fictional modern glass library pavilion with floating roof and reflecting pool. Scene / Context: centered building illustration over massive word LIGHT, cream white gallery poster surface. Source Recipe Translation: minimal architectural landmark poster. Preserve these source mechanics: ultra-premium minimalist architectural poster, central illustration, massive bold background word, tiny design-philosophy copy. Concrete social variant uses fictional modern glass library pavilion with floating roof and reflecting pool in centered building illustration over massive word LIGHT, cream white gallery poster surface. Composition: vertical 4:5 or 2:3 social-poster composition with a strong central focal subject and clean negative space; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: ultra-premium minimalist architectural poster, central illustration, massive bold background word, tiny design-philosophy copy; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: LIGHT / quiet structure; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text. Social Safety and Publishing Constraints: fictionalized social-safe version of the source prompt; adult-safe styling; real brands, logos, teams, and public-figure likenesses replaced with fictional/generic equivalents; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.
